prompt: Editorial fashion product photograph. The same dark-haired woman wearing the exact same plaid midi dress as the reference image: V-neck bodice, elbow-length gathered sleeves with adjustable ties, shirred elastic waist, full A-line skirt, black pointed flats. Setting: an outdoor Mediterranean cafe terrace with a warm ochre lime-washed plaster wall, soft dappled leaf shadow, pale flagstone paving, soft natural mid-morning sunlight, gentle shadows. CRITICAL FABRIC: the dress is a dark NAVY / indigo tartan plaid with crisp off-white cream windowpane grid lines and fine burgundy-red accent threads. It reads as a deep plum-navy from a distance. It is soft, muted, slightly faded vintage cotton, NOT a vivid, electric or saturated purple. Keep the navy ground dark and desaturated, preserve the burgundy-red threads and the clean cream grid lines. Cool neutral white balance on the fabric, do not let the warm sunlight tint it purple or orange. The wall and stone stay warm, the dress reads true navy. Full length, model is the clear hero filling most of the frame, dress in sharp focus, photoreal, 50mm lens, shallow depth of field, soft muted film grade. Pose: standing front-facing, relaxed, beside a round marble bistro table and weathered wooden chair, one hand resting lightly on the table edge, calm direct gaze.
